# services.cgit

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.cgit`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.cgit` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | Configure cgit instances. |
| `services.cgit.<name>.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable cgit. |
| `services.cgit.<name>.extraConfig` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | These lines go to the end of cgitrc verbatim. |
| `services.cgit.<name>.gitHttpBackend.checkExportOkFiles` | `boolean` | Whether git-http-backend should only export repositories that contain a `git-daemon-export-ok` file. When the backend is enabled and the check is disabled all repositories can be cloned irrespective of cgit's settings (e.g. the `ignore` repository setting). When enabled you must also configure `strict-export = "git-daemon-export-ok"` in `settings` to make cgit check for the same files. |
| `services.cgit.<name>.gitHttpBackend.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to bypass cgit and use git-http-backend for HTTP clones. While this enables HTTP clones to use the more efficient smart protocol, it does not support access control via cgit's settings (e.g. the `ignore` repository setting). If you want to disallow access to some repositories with this backend, enable `checkExportOkFiles` and set `strict-export = "git-daemon-export-ok"` in `settings`. |
| `services.cgit.<name>.group` | `string` | Group to run the cgit service as. |
| `services.cgit.<name>.nginx.location` | `string` | Location to serve cgit under. |
| `services.cgit.<name>.nginx.virtualHost` | `string` | VirtualHost to serve cgit on, defaults to the attribute name. |
| `services.cgit.<name>.package` | `package` | The cgit package to use. |
| `services.cgit.<name>.repos` | `attribute set of attribute set of (boolean or signed integer or string)` | cgit repository settings, see {manpage}`cgitrc(5)` |
| `services.cgit.<name>.scanPath` | `null or absolute path` | A path which will be scanned for repositories. |
| `services.cgit.<name>.settings` | `attribute set of (boolean or signed integer or string or list of (boolean or signed integer or string))` | cgit configuration, see {manpage}`cgitrc(5)` |
| `services.cgit.<name>.user` | `string` | User to run the cgit service as. |
